chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1753 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6897/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.6898/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 13.10.2025 Mr. Mushtaque Ali Tagar, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Counsel for the petitioner submits that, since a review petition in the case of General Post Office, Islamabad vs. Muhammad Jalal (PLD 2024 Supreme Court 1267) is pending before the Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan, therefore he does not wish to press the present Constitution Petition at this stage. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. However, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the concerned authorities for appropriate relief if the decision in the review petition is rendered in his favour. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
